headline: Why Isn’t NVIDIA Stock at $300 While Other Semiconductor Stocks Rally?
summary: Shares of NVIDIA (NASDAQ:NVDA) closed Thursday at $199.64, leaving the AI chip leader up just 7% year to date. NVIDIA shares trade only slightly above $200 on Friday morning. That’s a striking lag given the rest of the semiconductor complex is ripping higher on the same AI thesis NVIDIA pioneered. The headline question matters. A ... headline: Latest News In AI Chips - VAST Data's Valuation Surges Amid Rising AI Infrastructure Demand
summary: VAST Data has recently been valued at $30 billion following a successful closing of its Series F financing round, marking a significant increase from its previous valuation of $9.1 billion. This development highlights the growing demand for new data infrastructure necessary for the advancement and deployment of AI technologies on a global scale. VAST Data has positioned itself as a crucial component in the AI ecosystem by providing an innovative architecture that unifies data, compute, and...
